chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S- 41 of 2022. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No. 722 of 2022. 2.For orders on office objection as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No. 723 of 2022. 4.For hearing of main case. 21.02.2022. Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, advocate for the applicant. ===== It is case of the applicant that the private respondents by way of maltreatment threatened him to be killed for that he lodged FIR with P.S Kashmore; it has been cancelled by learned 2nd Judicial Magistrate, Kashmore, vide order dated 14.01.2022, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the learned trial Magistrate has cancelled FIR of the applicant without lawful justification by way of impugned order and such order being illegal is liable to be set aside. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. The FIR of the incident has been lodged with considerable delay. The accused involved by the applicant in his FIR were found to be innocent and very FIR on investigation was recommended by the police to be canceled under false “B” class. The learned trial Magistrate by cancelling the FIR under “C” class indeed has favoured the applicant. The impugned order is not sustaining any infirmity to be interfered with by this Court by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application; it is dismissed in limine together with listed applications, leaving the applicant to file a direct complaint of the incident, if so is advised to him. JUDGE ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT,

The impugned order is not sustaining any infirmity to be interfered with by this Court by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application; it is dismissed in limine together with listed applications, leaving the applicant to file a direct complaint of the incident, if so is advised to him. JUDGE ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. S- 37 of 2022. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No. 75 of 2022. 2.For orders on office objection as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No. 76 of 2022. 4.For hearing of main case. 21.02.2022. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Jokhio, advocate for the petitioner. ===== The petitioner by way of filing the instant constitutional petition has sought for protection for himself and his family members from harassment of the private respondents, which could be granted in his favour or otherwise by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, having jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. JUDGE

Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. JUDGE ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. S- 38 of 2022. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No. 77 of 2022. 2.For orders on office objection as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No. 78 of 2022. 4.For hearing of main case. 21.02.2022. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Channa, Advocate alongwith the petitioners. ===== The petitioners after having married with each other by way of filing the instant constitutional petition have sought for protection from harassment of the private respondents, which could be granted in their favour or otherwise by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, having jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. JUDGE
